description.ko: 빛의 물리학을 보여주는 정점으로, 고급 유리 광학을 통해 빛이 찬란한 무지개로 갈라지는 정밀한 순간을 포착합니다.
description.en: A masterclass in light physics, capturing the precise moment light splits into a brilliant rainbow through high-end glass optics.

prompt: A hyper-realistic macro photography shot of PRISM-2, titled 'The Chromatic Fracture.' A multi-faceted geometric crystal prism rests on a minimalist matte black surface. A single, needle-thin beam of pure white light pierces the glass, dispersing into an ultra-wide spectrum of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. Intricate rainbow caustics and sharp chromatic aberration patterns dance across the background. 8k resolution, professional studio lighting, emphasizing the crystalline clarity and the raw power of refracted energy.
